= IKE Docs

Documentation plumbing for the IKE Network. Hosts the
        ike-doc-maven-plugin (ike-doc packaging, AsciiDoc/render
        pipeline, PDF dispatch), the Koncept AsciiDoc extension,
        DocBook XSL + fonts, shared doc resources, and the semantic
        linebreak reformatter. Split from ike-pipeline to resolve the
        extensions=true reactor-load cycle. See IKE-Network/ike-issues#216.
